qa_pairs.question: Are extensions available for RAC application deadlines?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the submission deadline for Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) applications is final, and no extensions will be granted.

qa_pairs.question: Will late submissions be accepted for RAC applications?
qa_pairs.answer: No, late submissions for RAC applications will not be accepted.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have concerns about the RAC submission deadline policy?
qa_pairs.answer: Any concerns regarding the RAC submission deadline policy may be directed to allocations@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: When will applicants be notified of their RAC competition results?
qa_pairs.answer: All applicants will be notified of their competition results in March.

qa_pairs.question: How will I be informed about the outcome of my RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: You will be contacted by email with your competition results, along with any additional information or action items needed to finalize your allocation.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find a list of RAC recipients and their allocation details?
qa_pairs.answer: Once all recipients have been privately notified, a list of recipients, project allocation amounts, and allocation values will be published on the RAC Annual Reports page.
